description: MESSAI pipeline extraction statistics — snapshot from production database

quality.note: 90.4% of raw extractions have zero confidence and are excluded from published CSVs. Only confidence > 0 extractions with numeric values are included.

methodology.pdfProcessing: Nougat (Meta) for OCR, regex + LLM for structured extraction
methodology.dataFiltering: Published CSVs exclude confidence=0 and null numeric values. Raw database contains 323,606 rows; published contains 25,566.
